MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY TUPUOLA, JOSHAWN (MINOR) TUPUOLA, WILLIAM PENU (GUARDIAN AD LITEM) AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-24-2004 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
